tools.name: generate_wordcloud_svg
tools.description: Generate a word cloud and return it as an SVG image. Data is sent to word-cloud.net servers for processing only and is not logged or stored.

tools.name: generate_wordcloud_image
tools.description: Generate a word cloud and return it as a WebP image. Data is sent to word-cloud.net servers for processing only and is not logged or stored.

tools.name: generate_wordcloud
tools.description: Generate a word cloud and return an embeddable URL. Data is sent to word-cloud.net servers for processing only and is not logged or stored.
